Congo Basin Freshwater Biodiversity Sentinel Network

tasks.instruction: Filter to medium-risk water quality projects that include community engagement, then open the second result (sorted by newest start date) and use its contact form to request joining the volunteer mailing list for activities between June and December.

target_names: Community-Led Water Quality Watch for African Great Lakes

expected_values.message: I am interested in joining the volunteer mailing list for this project, especially for activities planned between June and December. Please add me to any community outreach announcements.
